info.title: sq
info.description: SonarQube CLI - A command-line interface for SonarQube and SonarCloud

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: table, json, csv, yaml [default: Table]

options.name: --force-v1
options.description: Force use of V1 API even if V2 is available

commands.name: create-event
commands.description: Create an event for a project analysis

options.description: Category of the event (VERSION or OTHER) [default: OTHER]

options.description: Issue type to set (BUG, VULNERABILITY, CODE_SMELL)

commands.description: Get fix suggestions for a specific issue

options.name: --force-v1
options.description: Force use of V1 API even if V2 is available

options.name: --fields
options.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in output

options.name: --pull-request
options.description: Pull request key for PR-specific operations

options.name: --severities
options.description: Filter by severities (comma-separated: INFO, MINOR, MAJOR, CRITICAL, BLOCKER)

options.name: --types
options.description: Filter by types (comma-separated: CODE_SMELL, BUG, VULNERABILITY, SECURITY_HOTSPOT)

options.name: --statuses
options.description: Filter by statuses (comma-separated: OPEN, CONFIRMED, REOPENED, RESOLVED, CLOSED)

options.name: --resolutions
options.description: Filter by resolutions (comma-separated: FALSE-POSITIVE, WONTFIX, FIXED, REMOVED)

options.name: --assigned
options.description: Filter for assigned (true) or unassigned (false) issues

options.name: --languages
options.description: Filter by languages (comma-separated: java, cs, py, etc.)

options.name: --created-after
options.description: Filter issues created after this date (yyyy-MM-dd)

options.name: --created-before
options.description: Filter issues created before this date (yyyy-MM-dd)

options.name: --created-in-last
options.description: Filter issues created in the last period (e.g., 7d, 2w, 1m)

options.name: --since-leak-period
options.description: Filter issues created since the leak period (new code)

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: table, json, csv, yaml [default: Table]

options.description: Force use of V1 API even if V2 is available
